metadata.title: Nailing a Clean Double Kill with Jett in VALORANT’s Mid Fight
metadata.description:
Watch this quick and sharp double kill as Jett takes control of mid. Timing and precision made this play stand out. Who’s your favorite agent to dominate with?

Hit like if you want more crisp VALORANT plays!

#valorant #shorts #gaming #fps #valorantclips
